---
title: "Introduction a farmCarbonR"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Introduction a farmCarbonR}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE)
```

## Description

farmCarbonR est un package R pour estimer et cartographier les stocks de
carbone organique du sol (SOC) en contexte agricole marocain.

## Donnees d exemple

```{r}
library(sf)
library(farmCarbonR)
df <- data.frame(
  parcelle_id = paste0("P", sprintf("%03d", 1:5)),
  SOC_mean    = c(18.5, 20.1, 15.3, 22.0, 17.8),
  BD_mean     = c(1.35, 1.42, 1.38, 1.30, 1.45),
  lon         = c(-5.0, -5.1, -5.2, -4.9, -5.3),
  lat         = c(32.0, 32.1, 31.9, 32.2, 32.0)
)
sol <- sf::st_as_sf(df, coords=c("lon","lat"), crs=4326, remove=FALSE)
```

## Calcul du stock SOC

```{r}
sol_stock <- calculate_soc_stock(sol, depth=30)
print(sol_stock[, c("parcelle_id", "SOC_stock_tCha")])
```

## Potentiel de sequestration

```{r}
seq_pot <- estimate_sequestration_potential(
  sol_stock,
  gain_couvert      = 0.3,
  gain_semis_direct = 0.25,
  gain_compost      = 0.4
)
print(seq_pot[, c("parcelle_id", "SOC_stock_tCha", "gain_total_tCha", "SOC_potentiel_tCha")])
```

## Resume des parcelles

```{r}
farm_sum <- summarize_farms(seq_pot)
print(farm_sum$detail[, c("parcelle_id", "SOC_categorie", "best_scenario")])
```

## Recommandations

```{r}
recos <- generate_recommendations(farm_sum$detail)
print(recos[, c("parcelle_id", "SOC_stock_tCha", "recommandation")])
```
